title: Has anyone tried Liposomal Vitamin C?
body:
My aunt is currently suffering from breast cancer, the radiation has taken a toll on her, her immune system is shot, she’s going to start more cancer pills soon. Her breast cancer appeared quickly and out of nowhere…a month after switching thyroid medication…We do not think that’s just a coincidence. My heart is broken for her but I have not lost faith. 

I was opening up to a coworker about this & he mentioned Liposomal Vitamin C having success for his uncles cancer very quickly. 

*He sent me articles and links which I will include in the comments bc formatting was being weird.* 

If anyone has any experience, opinion, interest, contacts or any knowledge at all about Liposomal Vitamin C for cancer, please comment below. The articles are sort of hard for me to understand not having much experience in science.


Thank you…
